message:
fix(codegen): Improve BigInt handling and wrapper coordination

- Make isBigIntExpression() more precise - only returns true for int()
  calls on string/BigInt arguments, not class instances
- Clear wrapper_opened flag at start of BigInt handling to prevent
  double-closing parens (fixes line 1295 error)
- Add intCallMightProduceBigInt() helper to detect when int() might
  produce BigInt from string parsing
- Add BigInt handling to genAssertEqual() - uses PyValue comparison
  when BigInt is involved (fixes lines 69, 283 comparison errors)
- Include related improvements to expressions, calls, and for loops
